zh.Trefdraeth, Anglesey, Wales: 威爾士安格萊特德拉斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ithel Fychan ap Ithel Llwd於1225年出生在英國威爾斯福林爾時，他的父親Ithel Llwyd ab Ithel Gam Hen of Tegaingl36歲，母親Tibod ferch Rhirid56歲。他於1230年與Adelicia or Eva verch Richard在威爾士安格萊特德拉斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1300年在他的家鄉享年75歲。

zh-hans.Trefdraeth, Anglesey, Wales: 威尔士安格萊特德拉斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ithel Fychan ap Ithel Llwd于1225年出生在英国威尔斯福林爾时，他的父亲Ithel Llwyd ab Ithel Gam Hen of Tegaingl36岁，母亲Tibod ferch Rhirid56岁。他于1230年与Adelicia or Eva verch Richard在威尔士安格萊特德拉斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1300年在他的家乡享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Geza, Jeno, Arpad, Attila, Csaba.

Hungarian: variant of   Papp  , meaning ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’. This surname is also found in Romania, Slovakia, Croatia, and Serbia, and also among Rusyns (in Serbia and Croatia). See also   Pop   2 and   Popa  .

variants.name: Papp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Laszlo, Zoltan, Geza, Istvan, Gabor, Miklos, Tibor, Arpad, Denes, Imre, Attila.
German (Bavaria, Tyrol): from Middle High German pap ‘baby food’, Dutch pap ‘porridge, pap’, hence perhaps a nickname denoting someone who had lost his teeth or subsisted on a meager diet.

Hungarian: from pap ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’, probably an occupational name for someone in the service of a priest or a nickname for a pious person. This surname is also found in Romania and Slovakia, and also among Rusyns. Compare Pap and Pop .

nameMeanings.name: Ithel
meanings: A Welsh name derived from the Greek, signifying 'blooming luxuriantly, flourishing, rich.'. It is from Ithel that we have first the name Ap-Ithel, then by corruption, Bithell and Bethell.

nameMeanings.name: Ithel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: compound of iud ‘lord, prince’ + hael ‘generous’; borne in the Mabinogi by the son of Llarian.

nameMeanings.name: Fychan
meanings: Welsh: A Welsh name of great antiquity, from vyckan, little, small; i.e. small in stature. Compare the surname Bychan and the Armoric Le Bihan.

en.lifeSummary: When Ithel Fychan ap Ithel Llwd was born in 1225, in Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Ithel Llwyd ab Ithel Gam Hen of Tegaingl, was 36 and his mother, Tibod ferch Rhirid, was 56. He married Adelicia or Eva verch Richard in 1230, in Trefdraeth, Anglesey, Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died in 1300, in his hometown, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ithel Fychan ap Ithel Llwd est né en 1225, à Flintshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ithel Llwyd ab Ithel Gam Hen of Tegaingl, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Tibod ferch Rhirid, avait 56 ans. Il a épousé Adelicia or Eva verch Richard en 1230, à Trefdraeth, Anglesey, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1300, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ithel Fychan ap Ithel Llwd 1225 in Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ithel Llwyd ab Ithel Gam Hen of Tegaingl 36 und seine Mutter Tibod ferch Rhirid 56. Er hat 1230 in Trefdraeth, Anglesey, Wales Adelicia or Eva verch Richard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1300 im Alter von 75 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ithel Fychan ap Ithel Llwd è nato il nel 1225 nel Flintshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Ithel Llwyd ab Ithel Gam Hen of Tegaingl, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Tibod ferch Rhirid, aveva 56 anni. Lui sposato Adelicia or Eva verch Richard nel 1230, nel Trefdraeth, Anglesey, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1300, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.Flintshire, Wales: イギリスウェールズフリントシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Ithel Fychan ap Ithel Llwdが1225年にイギリスウェールズフリントシュアイアで生まれた時，父Ithel Llwyd ab Ithel Gam Hen of Tegainglは36歳，母Tibod ferch Rhiridは56歳であった。1230年にウェールズアングレセイトレフドラエスでAdelicia or Eva verch Richardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1300年に故郷で75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ithel Fychan ap Ithel Llwd(이)가 1225년 영국 웨일스 플린츠히르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ithel Llwyd ab Ithel Gam Hen of Tegaingl(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Tibod ferch Rhirid(은)는 56세였다. 그는 1230년 웨일스 앤글레시 트레프드라이스에서 Adelicia or Eva verch Richard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1300년 그의 고향에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.Flintshire, Wales: Flintshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ithel Fychan ap Ithel Llwd nasceu em 1225, em Flintshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ithel Llwyd ab Ithel Gam Hen of Tegaingl, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Tibod ferch Rhirid, tinha 56 anos. Ele casou-se com Adelicia or Eva verch Richard em 1230, em Trefdraeth, Anglesey, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1300, em sua cidade natal, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ithel Fychan ap Ithel Llwd родился в 1225 г. в местности флинцхир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ithel Llwyd ab Ithel Gam Hen of Tegaingl было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Tibod ferch Rhirid, 56. Он женился на женщине по имени Adelicia or Eva verch Richard в 1230 г. в местности трефдрэет, англеси, Уэльс. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1300 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ithel Fychan ap Ithel Llwd nació en 1225, en Flintshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Ithel Llwyd ab Ithel Gam Hen of Tegaingl, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Tibod ferch Rhirid, tenía 56 años. Se casó con Adelicia or Eva verch Richard en 1230, en Trefdraeth, Isla Oscura, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió en 1300, en su pueblo, a la edad de 75 años.
